evals.prompt: 회원가입 → 대시보드 → 로그아웃까지 전체 플로우 E2E 테스트 만들어줘. 앱은 http://localhost:3000 에서 돌아가고 있어.
evals.expected_output: guard/auth/signup-to-logout.spec.ts 생성, route 전환 체인 검증, 상태 유지 검증 포함
expectations: Reads skills/guard-e2e-test/SKILL.md via Read tool
Reads references/e2e-conventions.md for locator and assertion rules
Reads references/agent-browser-patterns.md for browser exploration patterns
Detects existing playwright.config.ts and test conventions
Explores the running app via agent-browser before writing tests
Creates .spec.ts under guard/ subdirectory in the test directory
Test describe block has [Guard] prefix
Test names include journey_id [JOURNEY-AUTH-001]
Includes happy flow scenario (signup → dashboard → logout)
Includes state persistence scenario (reload after login)
Includes branch flow scenario (unauthenticated dashboard access → redirect)

evals.prompt: 상품 검색 → 장바구니 추가 → 결제 → 주문 완료 여정의 회귀 테스트가 필요해. localhost:3000에서 실행 중이야.
evals.expected_output: guard/commerce/search-to-order.spec.ts 생성, 4단계 route 전환 검증, 장바구니 상태 유지 검증
expectations: Reads skills/guard-e2e-test/SKILL.md via Read tool
Explores /search, /cart, /checkout, /order-complete routes via agent-browser
Creates .spec.ts under guard/commerce/ directory
Test covers full route chain: /search → /cart → /checkout → /order-complete
Verifies cart state persists across route transitions
Includes branch flow for empty cart checkout attempt
Uses data-testid or role-based locators, no CSS selectors
Does NOT write single-screen tests (that is plan-e2e-test scope)

evals.prompt: 온보딩 플로우 E2E 회귀 테스트 만들어줘. /onboarding/step-1 → step-2 → step-3 → /dashboard 순서야. http://localhost:3000 에서 확인 가능해.
evals.expected_output: guard/onboarding/multi-step-flow.spec.ts 생성, 다단계 폼 진행 검증, 뒤로가기 동작 검증
expectations: Reads skills/guard-e2e-test/SKILL.md via Read tool
Explores all 3 onboarding steps and dashboard via agent-browser
Creates .spec.ts under guard/onboarding/ directory
Test covers full route chain: /onboarding/step-1 → step-2 → step-3 → /dashboard
Verifies form data persists between steps
Includes branch flow for skipping a step (direct URL access to step-3)
Each test is independently runnable (no shared state between tests)
Runs playwright test to verify generated tests pass
